dashboard.label: Cisco IOS XE - Model Driven Telemetry
dashboard.description: MDT via OTEL Collector — YANG Operational Models (metrics index)

search.query: | mstats count("cisco.content.five-seconds") as c WHERE index=cisco_mdt BY cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as node | fields node | sort node

| mstats latest("cisco.content.device-system-data.current-time_info") as ct latest("cisco.content.device-system-data.boot-time_info") as bt latest("cisco.content.device-system-data.software-version_info") as sv latest("cisco.content.device-system-data.rommon-version_info") as rv latest("cisco.content.device-system-data.last-reboot-reason_info") as rr WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" cisco.encoding_path="Cisco-IOS-XE-device-hardware-oper*" BY cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as Switch | eval "Software Version"=coalesce(sv, "-"), "ROMMON"=coalesce(rv, "-"), "Boot Time"=coalesce(bt, "-"), "Reboot Reason"=coalesce(rr, "-") | table Switch "Software Version" "Boot Time" "Reboot Reason" "ROMMON" | sort Switch | appendpipe [| stats count | where count=0 | eval Switch="Waiting for device-hardware data...", "Software Version"="-", "Boot Time"="-", "Reboot Reason"="-", "ROMMON"="-"]

| mstats latest("cisco.content.device-inventory.hw-description_info") as desc latest("cisco.content.device-inventory.part-number_info") as pn latest("cisco.content.device-inventory.serial-number_info") as sn latest("cisco.content.device-inventory.version_info") as ver WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" cisco.encoding_path="Cisco-IOS-XE-device-hardware-oper*" BY cisco.node_id cisco.keys.hw-type cisco.keys.hw-dev-index | rename cisco.node_id as Switch cisco.keys.hw-type as "HW Type" cisco.keys.hw-dev-index as "Index" | eval Description=coalesce(desc, "-"), "Part Number"=coalesce(pn, "-"), "Serial Number"=coalesce(sn, "-"), Version=coalesce(ver, "-") | table Switch "HW Type" Description "Part Number" "Serial Number" Version | sort Switch "HW Type" | appendpipe [| stats count | where count=0 | eval Switch="Waiting for hardware inventory data...", "HW Type"="-", Description="-", "Part Number"="-", "Serial Number"="-", Version="-"]

| mstats avg("cisco.content.five-seconds") as "5 Sec" avg("cisco.content.one-minute") as "1 Min" avg("cisco.content.five-minutes") as "5 Min" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id span=5m
| mstats latest("cisco.content.five-seconds") as cpu_5sec WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" span=5m | tail 1

| mstats latest("cisco.content.holding-memory") as holding_memory WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY name | eval holding_memory_mb = round(holding_memory / 1048576, 2) | sort -holding_memory_mb | head 10 | rename name as "Process" | fields Process holding_memory_mb

| mstats latest("cisco.content.allocated-memory") as allocated latest("cisco.content.freed-memory") as freed WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY name span=5m | eval "Allocated (GB)" = round(allocated / 1073741824, 2) | eval "Freed (GB)" = round(freed / 1073741824, 2) | fields _time name "Allocated (GB)" "Freed (GB)" | sort -"Allocated (GB)" | rename name as "Process"

| mstats avg("cisco.content.environment-sensor.current-reading") as reading WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY name span=5m | where isnotnull(reading) | rename name as sensor | timechart span=5m avg(reading) by sensor

| mstats latest("cisco.content.environment-sensor.current-reading") as "Reading" latest("cisco.content.environment-sensor.name_info") as dummy WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY name cisco.node_id | rename name as "Sensor" | where isnotnull(Reading) | sort Sensor

| mstats avg("cisco.content.statistics.in-octets") as in_octets avg("cisco.content.statistics.out-octets") as out_octets WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY name span=5m | rename name as intf | where intf!="Null0" AND NOT match(intf, "^Loopback") | timechart span=5m sum(in_octets) as "In Octets" sum(out_octets) as "Out Octets"

| mstats latest("cisco.content.statistics.in-errors") as "In Errors" latest("cisco.content.statistics.out-errors") as "Out Errors" latest("cisco.content.statistics.in-octets") as "In Octets" latest("cisco.content.statistics.out-octets") as "Out Octets" latest("cisco.content.statistics.in-discards") as "In Discards" latest("cisco.content.speed") as "Speed" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY name | rename name as "Interface" | where isnotnull(Speed) AND Interface!="Null0" | sort Interface

| mstats avg("cisco.content.statistics.rx-kbps") as rx avg("cisco.content.statistics.tx-kbps") as tx WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY name span=5m | rename name as intf | where (rx > 0 OR tx > 0) AND intf!="Null0" | timechart span=5m avg(rx) as "Rx kbps" avg(tx) as "Tx kbps" by intf

| mstats avg("cisco.content.statistics.rx-pps") as rx avg("cisco.content.statistics.tx-pps") as tx WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY name span=5m | rename name as intf | where (rx > 0 OR tx > 0) AND intf!="Null0" | timechart span=5m avg(rx) as "Rx pps" avg(tx) as "Tx pps" by intf

| mstats latest("cisco.content.arp-entry.address_info") as addr WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY vrf value cisco.node_id | rename value as "IP Address" vrf as "VRF" cisco.node_id as "Switch" | append [| mstats latest("cisco.content.arp-entry.hardware_info") as hw WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY vrf value cisco.node_id | rename value as "MAC" vrf as "VRF" cisco.node_id as "Switch"] | append [| mstats latest("cisco.content.arp-entry.interface_info") as intf WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY vrf value cisco.node_id | rename value as "Interface" vrf as "VRF" cisco.node_id as "Switch"] | stats values("IP Address") as "IP Address" values("MAC") as "MAC" values("Interface") as "Interface" BY VRF Switch | sort VRF

| mstats latest("cisco.content.power") as "Power (mW)" latest("cisco.content.platform-name_info") as p latest("cisco.content.local-intf-name_info") as l latest("cisco.content.port-id_info") as pid WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY device-id cisco.node_id | rename device-id as "Neighbor" cisco.node_id as "Switch" | where isnotnull(Neighbor) | sort Neighbor

| mstats latest("cisco.content.matm-mac-entry.mac_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY table-type value cisco.node_id | rename value as "MAC Address" table-type as "Table Type" cisco.node_id as "Switch" | where isnotnull('MAC Address') | sort "Table Type" "MAC Address"

| mstats latest("cisco.content.lldp-state-details.enabled") as "Enabled" latest("cisco.content.lldp-state-details.frame-in") as "Frames In" latest("cisco.content.lldp-state-details.frame-out") as "Frames Out" latest("cisco.content.lldp-state-details.entries-aged-out") as "Aged Out" latest("cisco.content.lldp-state-details.frame-error-in") as "Frame Errors" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as "Switch" | where isnotnull(Enabled) | sort Switch

| mstats avg("cisco.content.state.temp.temp-instant") as temp WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cname span=5m | rename cname as component | where isnotnull(temp) AND temp > 0 | timechart span=5m avg(temp) by component

| mstats latest("cisco.content.state.temp.temp-instant") as "Temp" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cname cisco.node_id | rename cname as "Component" | where isnotnull(Component) | sort Component

| mstats latest("cisco.content.base.period") as "Period (cs)" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY subscription-id cisco.node_id | rename subscription-id as "Sub ID" | where isnotnull('Sub ID') | sort "Sub ID"
| mstats count WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.encoding_path span=5m | rename cisco.encoding_path as model | timechart span=5m sum(count) by model

| mstats latest("cisco.content.consumed-poe-power") as consumed latest("cisco.content.power-budget") as budget WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id | eval pct = round(consumed / budget * 100, 1) | fields pct | head 1

| mstats latest("cisco.content.consumed-poe-power") as "Consumed (W)" latest("cisco.content.power-budget") as "Budget (W)" latest("cisco.content.unused-power") as "Unused (W)" latest("cisco.content.total-power") as "Total (W)" latest("cisco.content.rsvd-power") as "Reserved (W)" latest("cisco.content.alloc-power") as "Allocated (W)" latest("cisco.content.num-ps") as "Power Supplies" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as "Switch" | sort Switch

| mstats latest("cisco.content.cpu-usage-processes.cpu-usage-process.five-seconds") as cpu WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY name | sort -cpu | head 10 | rename name as "Process" | fields Process cpu

| mstats avg("cisco.content.cpu-usage-processes.cpu-usage-process.five-seconds") as cpu WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY name span=5m | rename name as process | timechart span=5m avg(cpu) by process limit=5

| mstats avg("cisco.content.memory-stats.used-percent") as used avg("cisco.content.memory-stats.free-percent") as free WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id span=5m | timechart span=5m avg(used) as "Used %" avg(free) as "Free %" by cisco.node_id

| mstats latest("cisco.content.memory-stats.used-percent") as "Used %" latest("cisco.content.memory-stats.total") as total_kb latest("cisco.content.memory-stats.free-number") as free_kb latest("cisco.content.memory-stats.used-number") as used_kb latest("cisco.content.memory-stats.committed-percent") as "Committed %" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY fru cisco.node_id | eval "Total (GB)" = round(total_kb / 1048576, 2) | eval "Used (GB)" = round(used_kb / 1048576, 2) | eval "Free (GB)" = round(free_kb / 1048576, 2) | rename fru as "FRU" cisco.node_id as "Switch" | fields Switch FRU "Used %" "Total (GB)" "Used (GB)" "Free (GB)" "Committed %"
| mstats avg("cisco.content.stp-detail.topology-changes") as changes WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY instance span=5m | timechart span=5m avg(changes) by instance

| mstats latest("cisco.content.stp-detail.root-cost") as "Root Cost" latest("cisco.content.stp-detail.designated-root-priority") as "Root Priority" latest("cisco.content.stp-detail.topology-changes") as "Topo Changes" latest("cisco.content.stp-detail.bridge-priority") as "Bridge Priority" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY instance cisco.node_id | rename instance as "STP Instance" cisco.node_id as "Switch" | sort "STP Instance"

| mstats latest("cisco.content.stack-node.chassis-number") as "Chassis" latest("cisco.content.stack-node.latency") as "Latency" latest("cisco.content.stack-node.interface-mtu") as "MTU" latest("cisco.content.stack-node.mac-persistency-wait-time") as "MAC Persist Wait" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY chassis-number cisco.node_id | rename chassis-number as "Chassis #" cisco.node_id as "Switch" | sort "Chassis #"

| mstats avg("cisco.content.stack-node.keepalive-counters.sent") as sent avg("cisco.content.stack-node.keepalive-counters.received") as recv avg("cisco.content.stack-node.keepalive-counters.sent-failure") as fail WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY chassis-number span=5m | timechart span=5m avg(sent) as "Sent" avg(recv) as "Received" avg(fail) as "Failures"

| mstats latest("cisco.content.vlan-interfaces.subinterface") as "Subinterfaces" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY id cisco.node_id | rename id as "VLAN ID" cisco.node_id as "Switch" | sort 0 "VLAN ID"

| mstats latest("cisco.content.dot1x-global-stats.eapol-rx") as "EAPOL Rx" latest("cisco.content.dot1x-global-stats.eapol-tx") as "EAPOL Tx" latest("cisco.content.dot1x-global-stats.eapol-rx-start") as "Rx Start" latest("cisco.content.dot1x-global-stats.eapol-rx-logoff") as "Rx Logoff" latest("cisco.content.dot1x-global-stats.eapol-rx-resp-id") as "Rx Resp-ID" latest("cisco.content.dot1x-global-stats.eapol-rx-resp") as "Rx Resp" latest("cisco.content.dot1x-global-stats.eapol-rx-invalid") as "Rx Invalid" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as "Switch"

| mstats latest("cisco.content.port-details.access-mode-id") as "Access VLAN" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id | join type=left cisco.node_id [| mstats count WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" cisco.encoding_path="Cisco-IOS-XE-switchport-oper*" BY cisco.node_id | rename count as "Data Points"] | rename cisco.node_id as "Switch"

| mstats count WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" (cisco.encoding_path="Cisco-IOS-XE-transceiver-oper*" OR cisco.encoding_path="Cisco-IOS-XE-udld-oper*") BY cisco.encoding_path cisco.node_id | rename cisco.encoding_path as "Model" cisco.node_id as "Switch" count as "Data Points" | sort Model | appendpipe [| stats count | where count=0 | eval Model="No transceiver/UDLD data yet", Switch="-", "Data Points"=0]

| mstats latest("cisco.content.install-packages.pkg-state_info") as state_val WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" cisco.encoding_path="Cisco-IOS-XE-install-oper*" BY cisco.node_id cisco.keys.fru cisco.content.install-packages.pkg-name_info.value cisco.content.install-packages.pkg-version_info.value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch cisco.keys.fru as FRU "cisco.content.install-packages.pkg-name_info.value" as "Package" "cisco.content.install-packages.pkg-version_info.value" as "Version" | eval Status=case(state_val==1, "Active", state_val==2, "Inactive", 1==1, state_val) | table Switch FRU Package Version Status | sort Switch Package | appendpipe [| stats count | where count=0 | eval Switch="Waiting for install data...", FRU="-", Package="-", Version="-", Status="-"]

| mstats count WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" cisco.encoding_path="Cisco-IOS-XE-install-oper*" BY cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as Switch count as "Data Points" | sort Switch | appendpipe [| stats count | where count=0 | eval Switch="No install-oper data yet", "Data Points"=0]
